chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6363 of 2021 Shafqat Ahmed Shaikh Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 15.04.2024 None present. -.-.- Since first date of hearing compliance has not been made and even on the last two occasions counsel for petitioner has also not appeared. This is third time that the case has gone unattended. There is no intimation either. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge
